title: House 1 rating card — camera-ask FOUR stars
prompt:
Cast (Halloween night):
- @Sara: 7yo, FAIRY-PRINCESS COSTUME — silver tiara, pink-white ombre tutu w/ crystal bodice, glittery wings, fairy wand + jack-o-lantern bucket. Wavy dark-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Eva: 3yo, PUMPKIN-ONESIE COSTUME — round orange pumpkin body w/ carved jack-o-lantern face on tummy, green leaf-stem hat, tiny pumpkin treat bucket. Curly bright-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Joe: fluffy cream-and-gold POMERANIAN dog in red-with-black-spots LADYBUG body costume.

Camera: static medium-wide, eye-level, opening on the lawn — matches the closing frame of clip 4 stepped a few feet back from the cauldron.

Scene: @ep15_house1_witch_cauldron — cauldron softly visible background, paper bats hanging gently, soft purple porch glow.

0:0-0:2 — Static medium-wide. @Sara center-left holding a small paper rating card at chest height — five star outlines, four softly colored in pink kid-marker. @Eva center-right with @Joe's blue leash in her right hand, tiny pumpkin bucket on her left forearm. @Joe standing calm at Eva's left side.

0:2-0:4 — Slow dolly push in, framing tightens to a soft medium on @Sara's rating card. @Sara lifts the card a touch forward in a polite show-and-tell pose. @Eva does a tiny in-place happy bounce. @Sara: "Spooky AND friendly! That's FOUR stars!"

0:4-0:6 — Cut to medium-close on @Eva. @Eva turns her face softly toward @Sara, beams. @Eva: "FIVE!"

0:6-0:8 — Slow pan right back to @Sara, who turns toward camera. @Sara holds the rating card just slightly forward toward the lens, breaks the fourth wall. @Sara, softly to camera: "What would YOU give it?"

0:8-1:0 — Slow pull back to opening medium-wide. @Joe's tail wags faster. Trio settles.

Lighting: soft purple-and-warm-orange porch glow, gentle Halloween-night ambience.
Style: Pixar 3D feature-render, cinematic kid-show, NOT scary.
negativePrompt: duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same, mirrored figure, second father, two Papa, identical adults, second mother, two Mama, mama visible, papa visible, third child, second sister, second sara, second eva, two eva, duplicate eva, three girls, fourth child, fifth child, additional children, extra child in background, ghost figure, ghost kid, ghost children, shadow children, shadow of person, mirrored children, mirror reflection, family members in the background, strangers, crowd, group of people, other faces, background people, friends, neighbors, extra neighbors, three arms, third arm, extra arm, extra hand, floating hand, anatomy error, scary face, frightening expression, horror lighting, scary monster, real monster, monstrous teeth, fangs, claws, papa angry, papa thundering shout, papa apoplectic, papa rage face, intense yelling, blood, red liquid, red splatter, red stain, red ink on card, red rating card marks, red stars, gore, injury, scary, violent, distressing, motion lines, action lines, dust trails, speed lines, motion blur, papa with hair, papa not bald, eva with brown hair, eva with red hair, eva brunette, sara in ponytail, sara with straight hair, morphing, flickering, disfigured, distorted, extra face, unstable motion, papa standing still, papa motionless, papa idle, papa observing without acting, papa waiting passively, joe airborne, joe leaping, sara airborne, eva airborne, ginger visible, ginger in this clip, witch visible, second dog, two joe, eva running, sara running, dutch angle, handheld shake, jump cut
cameraStyle: static medium-wide opening into a slow dolly push, one cut to medium-close on Eva, capped by a slow pan right and slow pull back for the camera-ask
closingFrame: Front-lawn medium-wide a few feet from the cauldron — @Sara center-left holding the four-of-five-pink-stars rating card softly to camera; @Eva center-right beaming with @Joe's leash in right hand and pumpkin bucket on left forearm; @Joe standing calm at Eva's left side in bug costume, tail mid-wag; soft purple porch glow.
